Author: Ninethirty77
Name: The GreenZone
Description: Records observed Company Credits totals and shows weekly GC Seals tier progression, FC progress rings, and an optional overlay. Use /fcmetrics to open the window.
Changelog:
Reward display update:
- Completed tier bars now turn green and show the current Gil reward directly.
- The overlay current reward text now has a helper bubble explaining Monday night delivery and Gwen friend-list requirements.
